title: Papyrus Egerton 2
source_edition: Bell & Skeat 1935, *Fragments of an Unknown Gospel and Other Early Christian Papyri* (British Museum). Public domain.
date_of_composition: Manuscript c. 200 CE; underlying text 2nd century or earlier.
scope_note: Three pericopes from the canon: Fragment 1 recto (controversy with religious authorities), Fragment 1 verso (healing of a leper), Fragment 2 recto (question about tribute). The Fragment 2 verso nature-miracle is excluded by the canon.
completeness_note: Greek text not yet sourced into this JSON corpus. The text is short (~200 words across 3 pericopes) and freely available; pending follow-up session.
follow_up_needed: Fetch Greek text from Bell & Skeat 1935 (London: BM); also reproduced in Aland's Synopsis Quattuor Evangeliorum and in Klauck's Apocryphal Gospels (Eng. tr. 2003).
